title: Origins Unedibles
description: One addon mod for the Origin Mod that makes Unedible Items Edible without having to do Black magic
body:
# Another Origin Addon mod. 

That adds Items that are unedible to be Edible

## Need something to work smoothly like edible Leather?
There is edible Leather

## Having issues with your feed code eating the one item and not giving Hunger?
Well, now there's that one item you need to be edible Check the Gallery what items there are!

## Your feed code is still triggering with full Hunger?
Well, read the above msg :)

## Why was this made?
It's so that you don't have to do weird workarounds. 
And mostly me being annoyed while working on Custom Origins with Custom Food.

## Do the items have a set food value already?
Yeah. they do but if enough people want to set their food values let me know on my Discord and it will be changed.
https://discord.com/invite/U6dvJN7w5g

NOTICE AS OF 1.1.0 THEY LONGER DO!! YOU CAN NOW APPLY UR OWN FOOD VALUES!!

## Wat are the item Ids?
The item name ids are
originsunedibles:edible_vanillaitemname
check the gallery wat items there are!

## Will this be backported to X Version?
Eventually

## Will this get a Forge version?
No, I don't like working with Forge if someone wants to make a Forge fork free feel todo so.

### Check out my other Mods

https://modrinth.com/mod/builders-shop

https://modrinth.com/mod/yuns-cuisine
